generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired FEMA coordinator, I've seen firsthand how underfunded civil defense programs leave communities vulnerable. The current administration's cuts to local preparedness grants are putting lives at risk. We can't afford to wait until disaster strikes - our families deserve better protection. #CivilDefenseMatters
